content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.channels.discord_channel
FILE: cosmos/integration/channels/discord_channel.py (539 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Discord Channel Adapter
===================================

Discord Bot API integration for the Cosmos swarm.

Features:
- Gateway and REST API support
- Slash commands and context menus
- Message components (buttons, selects)
- Thread support
- Voice channel presence
- Reactions and embeds


CLASSES:
- DiscordChannel(BaseChannel): Discord Bot API channel adapter.

Supports:
- Direct messages
- Guild channels
-
  Methods: async def connect(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def disconnect(self)
  Methods: async def send_message(self, channel_id: str, text: str, media_path: Optional[str]=None, reply_to: O
  Methods: def register_slash_command(self, name: str, description: str, handler: Callable)
  Methods: def register_component_handler(self, prefix: str, handler: Callable)
  Methods: async def send_embed(self, channel_id: str, title: str, description: str, color: int=7506394, fields
  Methods: async def create_thread(self, channel_id: str, name: str, message_id: Optional[str]=None) -> Optiona
  Methods: async def get_guild_info(self, guild_id: str) -> Optional[Dict]
